metadata.target_audience: Premium travelers in India, Corporate clients, International tourists

primary.description: Deep Royal Blue - Use for primary actions, solid backgrounds, and footer

secondary.description: Luxury Gold - Use for 'Book Now', price highlights, and rating stars

accent.description: Bright Blue - Use for active states, links, and icons

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold hover:bg-primary/90 hover:scale-105 transition-all shadow-lg shadow-primary/20
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-primary border border-gray-200 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold hover:bg-gray-50 transition-all
buttons.cta: bg-secondary text-white rounded-full px-10 py-5 text-lg font-bold hover:bg-secondary/90 shadow-xl shadow-secondary/20

cards.vehicle: group bg-white rounded-3xl overflow-hidden border border-gray-100 hover:border-primary/10 transition-all duration-500 shadow-sm hover:shadow-2xl relative
cards.feature: bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:bg-white transition-all hover:shadow-lg border border-transparent hover:border-gray-100

inputs.search: h-14 bg-white border-0 ring-1 ring-gray-100 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 rounded-2xl px-6 text-lg shadow-sm

elements: Cinematic background image with overlay gradient (from black/50 to transparent)
Floating Glass Search Bar centered at bottom third
Large Heading with Playfair Display font
hero_section.search_bar: Airbnb-style pill shape, divided into 'Vehicle Type', 'Pick Up', 'Drop Off', 'Date'. Button is circular/pill on right.

vehicle_grid.card_style: Minimalist. Large image (aspect-video). Title and Price prominent. Specs (Seats, AC, Fuel) as small icons with text. 'Book Now' button visible on hover or always visible in mobile.
vehicle_grid.filters: Sidebar or Horizontal sticky bar. Clean checkboxes and range sliders.

quote_page.layout: Split view. Left side: Form/Details. Right side: Price Breakdown (Sticky).
quote_page.breakdown_card: Ticket-style visual. Dotted line separator between Total and Breakdown.

patterns: Scale up for buttons on hover (scale: 1.05)

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure 'Manrope' and 'Playfair Display' are imported from Google Fonts.
Do not use default Shadcn cards for vehicles; build a custom component with the 'group' class for hover effects.
Implement the 'WhatsApp' floating button fixed at bottom-right with z-50.
Use the provided image URLs strictly. Do not use placeholders.
For the Distance Calculator, mock the Google Maps API response if no key is provided, but build the UI to support it.

MUST: Ensure mobile responsiveness (stack grids to col-1).
